name: Abrupt switch from insurance question to refill request
description: Patient asks about insurance coverage, then immediately requests a medication refill.
goal: Ensure insurance coverage for diabetes medication, then request a refill for Metformin.
behavior: Start by asking about insurance coverage for Metformin
Quickly switch to requesting a Metformin refill without pausing
Be slightly impatient, seeking quick answers
success_criteria: Agent acknowledges the insurance query and provides an appropriate response
Agent handles the abrupt topic switch smoothly
Agent processes the refill request correctly or redirects it appropriately
orchestrator_hint: Patient starts asking about insurance, then abruptly switches to requesting a refill without waiting for a response.
